summary: Persist both Basic auth credential fields when users run `auth set-token` so file-backed authentication produces an Authorization header.
reason: Amplitude Basic auth requires an API key and secret key. Saving only one value leaves the generated `AuthHeader()` path empty after reload, so users who follow CLI setup instructions remain unauthenticated.
validated_outcome: `go test ./...`, `cli-printing-press publish validate`, `verify-skill`, and `verify-publish-package` pass with a regression test covering the persisted Basic auth pair.
